signal_title: Protecting Kids on Social Media Act (H.R.6149 and S.1291)
risk_rationale: The new legislation introduces mandatory age verification and parental consent requirements that are not fully aligned with TikTok's current baseline, posing a material compliance gap that requires immediate product changes.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states service is for age 13+ (or higher where local law requires)
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Prohibits individuals under 13 from accessing social media platforms
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline allows under-13 users in the US to access a limited experience, which is now prohibited by the new legislation.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Accounts for ages 13-17 are private by default
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Requires parental consent for users aged 13 to 17
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not require parental consent for users aged 13 to 17, which is now mandated by the new legislation.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Mandates age verification for social media account holders
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline relies on machine learning and safety review rather than explicit age verification, which is now required by the new legislation.

remediations.title: Implement Age Verification System
remediations.description: Develop and integrate a robust age verification system to ensure compliance with the new legislation requiring age verification for all account holders.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification system is implemented and operational
System accurately verifies user age at account creation

remediations.title: Parental Consent Mechanism for 13-17 Users
remediations.description: Introduce a parental consent mechanism for users aged 13 to 17 to comply with the new legislative requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Parental consent is required and verified for users aged 13 to 17
Consent mechanism is user-friendly and secure

remediations.title: Restrict Under-13 Access
remediations.description: Update platform policies and systems to ensure that users under 13 are not able to access the platform in any capacity.
acceptance_criteria: Users under 13 are blocked from accessing the platform
System checks and enforces age restrictions effectively

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new legislation could result in significant legal penalties and reputational damage, affecting user trust and platform growth.
recommended_actions: Prioritize the development of an age verification system.
Engage with legal and compliance teams to ensure all new features meet regulatory requirements.
Communicate upcoming changes to users and parents to ensure smooth transition and compliance.
